content.en:
Ye Tian refined a drop of dragon gold blood, and his heart became stronger and stronger.

With so much dragon gold blood, he could definitely complete the secondary transformation of his heart, so that the immeasurable blood could undergo a secondary blood transformation and step into the realm of the Heavenly Ancestor of the Second Blood Transformation Realm.

Time passed slowly, and finally on this day, Ye Tian's heart began to transform.

Rumble!!!!!

Countless energies from the outside poured into his location.

The energy of the White Elephant City is very strong, far beyond the territorial waters of Wanlong, so his breakthrough only needs to absorb the energy within the small area around him, and he will not suck in energy in a large area.

Therefore, his breakthrough will not cause any major disturbances.

After all, in the White Elephant City, it is common for blood transformation realm creatures to break through, and if there is a lot of movement every time, then it is okay.

After a long time, the metamorphosis of the heart is completely completed, and the blood of the immeasurable blood begins to undergo blood transformation.

And as the blood transformation progressed, his flesh and blood became stronger and stronger.

Finally, the second blood transformation was completed.

"Breakthrough, the Second Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor Realm has arrived!"

Ye Tian felt that his current strength was incomparably stronger, far surpassing that of before.

Every time the Boundary-Breaking Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor completes a blood transformation, the strength increase is much greater than that obtained by the ordinary Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor after completing a blood transformation.

Therefore, his current strength is estimated to be at the level of combat effectiveness of a creature in the Blood Transformation Realm four times.

"If I had broken through to the Second Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor at the beginning, I wouldn't have to worry about the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor, and I could kill him directly!"

Ye Tian muttered.

For the breakthrough of cultivation, he didn't have many good things on him, so he didn't plan to trade here, so he left directly.

......

Outside the White Elephant City.

When Ye Tian left here, he felt the prying eyes of other Blood Transformation Realm creatures, and these Blood Transformation Realm creatures were also undisguised.

"It seems that a lot of Blood Transformation Realm creatures want to fight my idea!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He suspected that the matter of his trading in a few stores had been exposed, or that it was directly a blood-mutated creature under the command of those races.

Swish!

Ye Tian shuttled through the shock current.

These Blood Transformation Realm creatures still didn't make a move, because this was still the area near the White Elephant City, and it belonged to the territory of the White Shadow Elephant Clan.

If you do it here, it will still anger the White Shadow Elephant Clan.

Soon, Ye Tian left the territory of the White Shadow Elephant Clan.

Buzz Buzz!!

A Blood Transformation Realm creature shuttled directly over and intercepted Ye Tian.

"Eight Blood Transformation Realm creatures!"

Moreover, these eight Blood Transformation Realm creatures are all three Blood Transformation Realms, from different races, and they should be a gang, or they are attached to the same powerful race.

"Kill him!

The eight Blood Transformation Realm creatures didn't say a word, and went straight to the action.

In their opinion, it was simply too simple to kill a second-blood transformation realm creature like Ye Tian, and they could easily kill Ye Tian.

"Look for death!"

The power of the immeasurable supernatural power on Ye Tian's body surged, piercing a third-blood transformation realm creature with one finger, and blasting another blood transformation realm creature with one palm.

And his body was integrated with the immeasurable magic technique of the ten-armed golden body, and no matter how strong his physical body was, their attacks would not break the defense at all when they hit his body.

Bang bang bang!!

One Blood Transformation Realm creature after another was blown up by Ye Tian, and in the blink of an eye, eight Blood Transformation Realm creatures were killed and injured heavily.

"It's not good, he's a boundary-breaking genius among cultivators!"

The eight Blood Transformation Realm creatures wanted to escape, but it was too late.

Ye Tian quickly shot and killed them one by one, without mercy.

Immediately, he took all the resources from these Blood Transformation Realm creatures, and then left.

Not long after Ye Tian left, some Blood Transformation Realm creatures dared to appear here.

"What a terrifying strength, I didn't expect to meet a boundary-breaking genius among cultivators, and it's not an ordinary boundary-breaking genius, eight third-time blood transformation realm creatures were killed in an instant, this is definitely the strength of the fourth blood transformation realm!" said a third-time blood transformation realm creature in horror.

Several other Blood Transformation Realm creatures were also terrified, but fortunately they moved a little slower, otherwise they would have died.

......

In the rest of the journey, Ye Tian did not encounter a Blood Transformation Realm creature.

After all, he had already shown his strength, even four Blood Transformation Realm creatures couldn't kill him, and the top four Blood Transformation Realm creatures could severely damage him.

If you want to kill him, you need at least five Blood Transformation Realm creatures.

And the creatures of the five-time blood transformation realm are already the top existences of the major races, such as the Vajra snake clan, the number of creatures in the five-time blood transformation realm will not be very large, they are all at the level of elders.

This kind of existence will not easily do robbery business, one is to lose face, and the other is to easily bring trouble to their own race.

Therefore, with the strength of the Four Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, as long as they are not too unlucky, they will not be in danger of their lives when they encounter some brutal and powerful Blood Transformation Realm creatures.

Of course, if you go to some dangerous places or provoke powerful races, it is easy to fall.

Time flies.

Ye Tian spent a lot of time stabilizing his realm, and at the same time, he replaced his other copy bodies with the Second Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor cultivation.

Subsequently, he tried to continue to use dragon gold blood to refine his heart, the effect was still there, but it was much worse, if he wanted to refine his heart to the level of three transformations, he needed at least hundreds of thousands of dragon gold blood.

And hundreds of thousands of drops of dragon gold blood are equivalent to hundreds of thousands of white elephant gold!

He had just killed those six Blood Transformation Realm creatures, and he had only obtained thousands of pieces of White Elephant Gold, and if he wanted to exchange it for White Elephant Gold, ordinary resources were useless, at least treasure resources at the level of Blood Transformation Realm.

Therefore, it is somewhat difficult to obtain a large amount of white elephant gold.

"It's a pity that the ability to fuse all things is a little low, and there is no way to fuse a treasure at the level of the Bleeding Transformation Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After all, his copying talent has not been upgraded, and many functions are weak, so they are of little use to him.

In other words, the ability to copy the body is related to one's own cultivation, so it can be used all the time, and other abilities are not good.

Just like the white elephant gold, Ye Tian's ability to copy all things cannot copy it.

"I don't know if I can continue to upgrade my ability to copy my talent, but even if I can level up, it's too difficult!"

After all, he had not encountered a treasure that could upgrade his copying talent for such a long time.

Therefore, he did not count on it either.

In order to be able to gather enough white elephant gold, Ye Tian still had to use the Vajra Snake to copy his body, and continuously collect the golden muscle fluid from the Vajra Snake Clan, collecting some at a time, without affecting the attention of the high-level of the Vajra Snake Clan.

On this day, he took another batch of golden muscle fluid to the White Elephant City.
